originalTitle: These 16 states are offering tax-free shopping days as back-to-school costs soar to over $800 per student
summary: As inflation continues to squeeze household budgets, parents and students are on a mission to find back-to-school bargains.
content: As inflation continues to squeeze household budgets, parents and students are on a mission to find back-to-school bargains.
chineseTitle: 随着返校费用飙升至每位学生超过 800 美元，这 16 个州正在提供免税购物日
chineseSummary: 随着通货膨胀继续挤压家庭预算，家长和学生的使命是寻找返校特价商品。
chineseContent: 随着通货膨胀继续挤压家庭预算，家长和学生的使命是寻找返校特价商品。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
